The first card you play each turn goes into Ultraspace and may trigger a Leap/Quasar effect if it has one.

There are two uses for Ultraspace. First, you can Annihilate the leftmost card for Insight (1 draw, 1 arithmetica). When in doubt, this is a pretty safe option to spam. Second, you can build up an Extra Turn that ideally has a bunch of cards you want to play together. This will probably be a bursty defensive or offensive setup. You can use Annihilate to curate and stall this turn as needed (probably want it on an Elite / Boss and not random mobs).
